reasoning: Following the mandatory protocol, I reviewed the 'Comments History' for order #000000626. An internal staff note dated Jan 14, 2026, flags this customer for high-frequency refund fraud (13 refunds in 60 days, 87% refund rate) and explicitly instructs not to process further refunds and to escalate to Loss Prevention. Although the customer's current claim is 'wrong size/color' rather than 'item not received', the established pattern of fraudulent behavior documented in the order notes justifies denying the request and following the internal directive to escalate.
